name: 7 Layer Brownie Ice Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:35
Trace an 8-inch circle on a piece of waxed paper using a cake pan as a guide. Place it on a stack of 6 more pieces of waxed paper. Using the traced circle as a guide, cut through all pieces of paper, giving you 7 waxed paper rounds. Heat oven to 375°F. Have 2 cookie sheets and an 8-inch springform pan ready.
Brownie Layers:
Whisk cocoa, water, egg, and vanilla in a small bowl until blended and smooth.
In a large bowl with electric mixer, beat butter and sugar about 3 minutes until pale and fluffy.
Beat in cocoa mixture (batter may look curdled). With the mixer on low speed, gradually add flour until well blended (batter will be very stiff).
Spread the 7 rounds of waxed paper out on the countertop. Drop a level tablespoon of batter in the center of each round. Divide the remaining tablespoon of batter between the rounds (about 2 teaspoons each).
Moisten a cookie sheet with water. Place 2 waxed paper rounds on the sheet (the water will stop them from slipping). Spread batter almost to the edges of the rounds.
Bake for 8 minutes or until the surface looks dry and is slightly springy to the touch. While the first batch bakes, spread out batter for the next 2 layers.
Cool baked layers on the cookie sheet on a wire rack for 3 minutes. Put the layers on waxed paper on a wire rack. Let cool completely.
Bake and cool remaining layers.
Meanwhile, line the springform pan with plastic wrap, letting enough wrap extend about the sides of the pan to cover the top when filled. Peel the waxed paper off the cooled brownie layers. Place 1 layer in the bottom of the pan. Spread evenly with 1 cup ice cream. Top with another brownie layer, then another cup of ice cream. Repeat with 5 more brownie layers and ice cream, ending with a brownie layer on top. Fold plastic wrap over the top and freeze for at least 8 hours or wrap airtight and freeze up to 1 month.
To serve: Remove sides of pan and peel plastic wrap down from the sides. Lift the cake off the plastic wrap onto a serving plate.
